options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -place_3d_use_existing_bump_tsv
options.description: reuse pre-placed bumps or TSVs

options.name: -place_design_enable_3d
options.description: enable 3d placement

options.name: -place_design_floorplan_mode
options.description: run placement in floorplan mode

options.name: -place_design_integrity_ir_fix_effort
options.description: set power integrity placement IR fixing effort

options.name: -place_design_refine_macro
options.description: specify whether to run refine_macro_place after place_design -concurrent_macro

options.name: -place_design_refine_place
options.description: if set to false, calls to refinePlace from other apps (such as placeDesign, optDesign) will not run refinePlace

options.name: -place_detail_allow_border_pin_abut
options.description: allow instance abut with its neighbors when it has pins near by the cell boundary

options.name: -place_detail_allow_single_height_row_symmetry_x
options.description: allow single height row to be symmetryX

options.name: -place_detail_check_cut_spacing
options.description: Check via cut spacing during DRC checking

options.name: -place_detail_check_inst_space_group
options.description: check inst space group

options.name: -place_detail_check_route
options.description: do DRV checks against FIXED wires during legalization, along with preroutes

options.name: -place_detail_color_aware_legal
options.description: enable adjacent cell color conflict check in legalization

options.name: -place_detail_context_aware_legal
options.description: specify the types of cell context rules the placer needs to honor. The argument values [optional, required, user ignore_soft] can be used separately or combined, but they are exclusive to all | none (default=all)

options.name: -place_detail_eco_max_distance
options.description: specify max distance (in micron) for refinePlace ECO mode

options.name: -place_detail_eco_priority_insts
options.description: select instance priority for refinePlace ECO mode

options.name: -place_detail_fixed_shifter
options.description: mark shifters FIXED once placed

options.name: -place_detail_honor_inst_pad
options.description: honor padding from specifyInstPad in detail placement

options.name: -place_detail_io_pin_blockage
options.description: ioPins from top-level are treated as pre-routes during DRV checks in legalization

options.name: -place_detail_irdrop_aware_effort
options.description: selects which IR drop optimization effort level to use during refinePlace

options.name: -place_detail_irdrop_aware_timing_effort
options.description: selects which timing effort level to use during refinePlace

options.name: -place_detail_irdrop_region_number
options.description: value for debug_irdrop -nregion in native API

options.name: -place_detail_legalization_inst_gap
options.description: minimum gap between instances (unit sites)

options.name: -place_detail_max_shifter_column_depth
options.description: maximum distance from vertical power domain boundary that a shifter can be placed

options.name: -place_detail_max_shifter_depth
options.description: maximum distance from a horizontal or vertical power domain boundary that a shifter can be placed

options.name: -place_detail_max_shifter_row_depth
options.description: maximum distance from a horizontal power domain bounary that a shifter can be placed

options.name: -place_detail_no_filler_without_implant
options.description: there is no cell which has no implant obs

options.name: -place_detail_pad_fixed_insts
options.description: honor cell-padding for FIXED instances in refinePlace

options.name: -place_detail_pad_physical_cells
options.description: padding overlap with physcial cells would be honored

options.name: -place_detail_PGFTV_insertion_cell_list
options.description: Specify list of cells as PG FTV cells

options.name: -place_detail_preroute_as_obs
options.description: specify layers on which preroute are taken as OBS

options.name: -place_detail_preserve_routing
options.description: do not delete routed wires during refinePlace

options.name: -place_detail_remove_affected_routing
options.description: delete only wires whose nets were touched due to moved cells

options.name: -place_detail_swap_eeq_cells
options.description: replace master cells by its EEQ cell during legalization, to keep max-dist move low

options.name: -place_detail_use_check_drc
options.description: Use FGC based DRC engine in legalization

options.name: -place_detail_use_diffusion_transition_fill
options.description: insert OD transition filler in 1X gap

options.name: -place_detail_use_GA_filler_groups
options.description: filler cell insts will only be replaced by logic insts that belong to same GA groups.

options.name: -place_detail_use_no_diffusion_one_site_filler
options.description: override -fillerGapMinGap to 0 and all source-drain spacing rule to 1 site during legalizing

options.name: -place_detail_wire_length_opt_effort
options.description: selects which wire-length optimization effort level to use during refinePlace

options.name: -place_global_activity_power_driven
options.description: identifies and constrains power-critical nets to reduce switching power

options.name: -place_global_activity_power_driven_effort
options.description: -place_global_activity_power_driven_effort mode

options.name: -place_global_align_macro
options.description: enable mixed-placer to align nearby same-size macros during global placement

options.name: -place_global_auto_blockage_in_channel
options.description: Placement will (temporarily) block channels between areas with limited routing capacity

options.name: -place_global_clock_gate_aware
options.description: find better placement for clock gating elements towards the center of gravity for fanout

options.name: -place_global_clock_power_driven
options.description: clock power driven

options.name: -place_global_clock_power_driven_effort
options.description: -place_global_clock_power_driven_effort mode

options.name: -place_global_cong_effort
options.description: level of effort for congestion driven global placer

options.name: -place_global_cpg_effort
options.description: level of effort for CPG

options.name: -place_global_enable_distributed_place
options.description: enable distributed placement platform

options.name: -place_global_ignore_scan
options.description: ignore scan net during placement

options.name: -place_global_ignore_spare
options.description: discard spare cell connections during global placement

options.name: -place_global_max_density
options.description: placement strives to not let density exceed given value, in any part of design

options.name: -place_global_module_aware_spare
options.description: Spare insts are placed randomly along with the containing module's insts

options.name: -place_global_module_padding
options.description: define the padding factor for the given module to reduce the local density and congestion

options.name: -place_global_place_io_pins
options.description: place IO Pins concurrently with std.cell placement, and do layer assignment

options.name: -place_global_reorder_scan
options.description: turn on reorder scan during placement

options.name: -place_global_soft_guide_strength
options.description: level of effort for user definded softGuide for global placer

options.name: -place_global_timing_effort
options.description: level of effort for timing driven global placer

options.name: -place_global_uniform_density
options.description: enable even cell distribution for designs with less than 70% utilization

options.name: -place_hard_fence
options.description: honor fence and region constraints in refinePlace

options.name: -place_hierarchical_flow
options.description: enable hierarchical pin assignment flow

options.name: -place_opt_post_place_tcl
options.description: a tcl script to be sourced after initial placement and before preCTS optimization in place_opt_design

options.name: -place_opt_run_global_place
options.description: place opt run global place

options.name: -place_spare_update_timing_graph
options.description: update timing graph during placeSpareModule

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
